message:
fix(test): isolate patrol tests from shared Dolt database

The patrol discovery tests used a fixed "pt" prefix for bd init, causing
all test runs to share the same beads_pt database on the Dolt server.
Leftover hooked beads from previous runs contaminated findActivePatrol
results, making TestFindActivePatrolStale fail because it found old beads
with open children.

Two fixes:
- Use a unique random prefix per test run to get a clean database
- Inject the isolated *beads.Beads instance into PatrolConfig so
  findActivePatrol uses the same isolated instance as the test setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,8 @@
 package cmd
 
 import (
+	"crypto/rand"
+	"encoding/hex"
 	"encoding/json"
 	"os"
 	"os/exec"
@@ -423,7 +425,14 @@ func setupPatrolTestDB(t *testing.T) (string, *beads.Beads) {
 	t.Helper()
 	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
 	b := beads.NewIsolated(tmpDir)
-	if err := b.Init("pt"); err != nil {
+	// Use a unique prefix per test run to avoid cross-run contamination
+	// in the shared Dolt database.
+	var buf [4]byte
+	if _, err := rand.Read(buf[:]); err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("rand: %v", err)
+	}
+	prefix := "pt" + hex.EncodeToString(buf[:])
+	if err := b.Init(prefix); err != nil {
 		t.Fatalf("bd init: %v", err)
 	}
 	return tmpDir, b
@@ -475,6 +484,7 @@ func TestFindActivePatrolHooked(t *testing.T) {
 		PatrolMolName: molName,
 		BeadsDir:      tmpDir,
 		Assignee:      assignee,
+		Beads:         b,
 	}
 
 	patrolID, _, found, findErr := findActivePatrol(cfg)
@@ -523,6 +533,7 @@ func TestFindActivePatrolStale(t *testing.T) {
 		PatrolMolName: molName,
 		BeadsDir:      tmpDir,
 		Assignee:      assignee,
+		Beads:         b,
 	}
 
 	_, _, found, findErr := findActivePatrol(cfg)
@@ -559,6 +570,7 @@ func TestFindActivePatrolZeroChildren(t *testing.T) {
 		PatrolMolName: molName,
 		BeadsDir:      tmpDir,
 		Assignee:      assignee,
+		Beads:         b,
 	}
 
 	patrolID, _, found, findErr := findActivePatrol(cfg)
@@ -611,6 +623,7 @@ func TestFindActivePatrolMultiple(t *testing.T) {
 		PatrolMolName: molName,
 		BeadsDir:      tmpDir,
 		Assignee:      assignee,
+		Beads:         b,
 	}
 
 	patrolID, _, found, findErr := findActivePatrol(cfg)
